tasks.label: Format Files
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && .venv/bin/python -m black --line-length 100 DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/train.py DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/__init__.py DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/test_mlx_comprehensive.py DeepFilterNet/examples/mlx_training.py 2>&1 && .venv/bin/python -m isort --profile black DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/train.py DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/__init__.py DeepFilterNet/df_mlx/test_mlx_comprehensive.py DeepFilterNet/examples/mlx_training.py 2>&1

tasks.label: Git commit DUP-7.1
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && git add -A && git commit -m 'refactor(loss): remove dead MaskSpecLoss class (DUP-7.1)' --no-verify --no-gpg-sign

tasks.label: Check test results
tasks.command: cat /tmp/dfn_test_dup72.txt | grep -E '(passed|failed|error|FAILED)' || echo 'Still running or no results'

tasks.label: Commit DUP-7.2
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && git add -A && git commit -m 'refactor(train): delegate MultiResolutionSTFTLoss to SpectralLoss (DUP-7.2)' --no-verify --no-gpg-sign

tasks.label: Push changes
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && git log --oneline -5 && echo '---' && git push 2>&1

tasks.label: Commit and push audit report
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && git add -A && git commit -m 'docs: add Pass 7 duplication audit report' --no-verify --no-gpg-sign && git push 2>&1

tasks.label: Commit DUP-8.1
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && git add -A && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m 'refactor(train): delegate Trainer.save_checkpoint to module-level save_checkpoint (DUP-8.1)' --no-verify --no-gpg-sign 2>&1

tasks.label: Commit report and push
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && git add -A && git commit -m 'docs: add Pass 8 duplication audit report' --no-verify --no-gpg-sign && git push 2>&1

tasks.label: Verify state
tasks.command: cd ${workspaceFolder} && git log --oneline -3 && echo '---' && git status --short

tasks.label: Commit DUP-9.1
tasks.command:
cd ${workspaceFolder} && git add -A && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m 'refactor(train): delegate train_with_data.py checkpoint I/O to train.py (DUP-9.1)

Removed inline save_checkpoint/load_checkpoint from train_with_data.py
and replaced with imports from the canonical train.py implementation.
Also fixed stale train_gan.py references in ROADMAP.md.

~90 lines of duplicated code removed.' --no-verify --no-gpg-sign 2>&1
